items.rationale: Just joined a16z crypto as operating partner; views the quality of founders building on crypto networks as exceptional and analogizes the moment to early-Internet/Netscape days.

citations.quote: The quality and creativity of entrepreneurs building the next generation of startups on top of crypto networks is incredible... LFG!!
The parallels between crypto then and now, and the growth of the Internet when I began my career at Netscape in the mid-90s, are striking.

items.rationale: Sees fascinating, early-stage interplay between crypto and AI/ML as a fertile emerging area.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML

items.rationale: Celebrated the Filecoin FVM launch as a major step forward for decentralized storage and compute capabilities.

citations.quote: This is a tremendous step forward in advancing the capabilities of decentralized storage and compute

items.rationale: Praised Matter Labs (zkSync) as a phenomenal accomplishment for the ecosystem; treats L1/L2 verified-contract share as a key adoption metric.

citations.quote: Congrats to @gluk64 and the entire @the_matter_labs teams! What a phenomenal accomplishment for the entire ecosystem!
An L1 or L2 blockchain could track their progress based on their share of Verified Smart Contracts in a given quarter.

items.rationale: Repeatedly frames developer activity as the key adoption signal and insists the industry is still very early; cites Electric Capital data.
items.age_note: Core view first stated 2022-01-10 ('still early days'); restated/operationalized 2023-04-12, so current and reinforced rather than stale.

citations.quote: Love @ElectricCapital's annual analysis of Web3 developer activity. By any measure, we are still early days.
Projects focused on developer tooling can leverage insights into the number of active crypto developers as a way to measure mindshare and adoption.

items.rationale: Openly excited about Yuga Labs' roadmap and enjoyed exploring the Otherside origin story; engages enthusiastically with the NFT-brand ecosystem.

citations.quote: Huge congratulations to Mike Seavers... and the entire team @yugalabs. Very excited to see what you are all going to build together.

items.rationale: Became an Alliance DAO contributor to help build the next generation of Web3 and DeFi startups.
items.age_note: Stated once on 2022-01-13 and never explicitly restated; persists as a standing affiliation but is the oldest of his crypto signals.

citations.quote: Excited to be a contributor to @alliancedao. Looking forward to being part of building the next generation of Web3 and defi startups.

items.rationale: Flags that crypto founders operate in a volatile, rapidly changing environment that makes defining quantifiable objectives hard — a structural caution rather than a bearish call.

citations.quote: how to define quantifiable company and product objectives/metrics in an environment that is volatile and rapidly changing.

items.rationale: Endorsed the FVM launch as a major advancement for decentralized storage/compute; the only specific network/token he champions by name.

citations.quote: Congratulations to... the entire @Filecoin community on today's launch of #FVM. This is a tremendous step forward...

risk_regime.rationale: He joined a16z crypto in April 2023 with unbridled enthusiasm ('LFG'), repeatedly insists crypto is in its 'early innings'/'early days,' and draws explicit parallels to the early Internet. This is a builder's structural bullishness on the asset class rather than a tactical market-timing call; he expresses no near-term price view and no bearishness.

notes: Rosenthal is an operating partner focused on company-building (PMF, pricing, hiring, board management, biz dev), so the corpus is dominated by management advice rather than market/price commentary — most market signals are inferred from what he chooses to celebrate. His crypto views are uniformly constructive and structural; no concerns about specific sectors or tokens are voiced, and no token price targets exist. Bitcoin is mentioned only historically (cdixon introducing him to crypto 'above and beyond Bitcoin,' 2023-04-03), implying his interest skews toward the broader smart-contract/app ecosystem over BTC itself. Conviction scores reflect intensity of stated enthusiasm, tempered by the fact that endorsements are often congratulatory tweets to portfolio-adjacent teams. Recency strongly favors the April–June 2023 post-a16z-join statements, which are consistent with (and reinforce) his older 2022 'still early days' stance — no reversals detected.
